﻿--- Concept Drift Analysis (Real Credit Card Data) ---
Baseline (No Drift):   ROC-AUC = 0.9016
Gradual Drift (40%):   ROC-AUC = 0.9178 (Drop: +0.0161)
Sudden Drift (60%):    ROC-AUC = 0.5806 (Drop: -0.3211)
Hybrid Retraining:     ROC-AUC = 0.8595 (Recovery vs Sudden: +0.2790)
